properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can feel the earth slipping from my feet Got lost chasing dreams that I can't seem to reach But You never stopped chasing me I've been hiding from my past Wasting time ticking fast Thought I was out of reach But You never stopped chasing me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You would search the whole world over to find me (to find me)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's no place You wouldn't go You're searching high and low You leave the ninety-nine to lead me home I can't outrun Your love There's no road that's long enough You leave the ninety-nine to lead me home There's no place You wouldn't go Theres no place You wouldn't go

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can hear the sound of struggle fade away When I hear You call my name And I can finally see What You see when You look at me You're convinced I'm worth it all Nailed the proof up on the cross So I can finally see

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You would search the whole world over to find me (to find me) You would search the whole world over to find me (to find me)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's no place You wouldn't go You're searching high and low You leave the ninety-nine to lead me home I can't outrun Your love There's no road that's long enough You leave the ninety-nine to lead me home There's no place You wouldn't go
